description: The large spawn-in letters on Story (S), Campus (C), and New Liberal Arts (N) pages all appear at a great, consistent height. Other individual pages are inconsistent — some letters spawn too high, too low, or at different sizes. Make every individual page's SectorHeader letter match the height/positioning of Story, Campus, and Liberal Arts. Reference: src/components/layout/SectorHeader.tsx and each section component. No Navbar.tsx changes — safe to run in parallel with FRAC-83/84.
title: SectorHeader height consistency across all individual pages
